changes.value:
Replace all direct `invoke()` calls for mutations with calls through the command dispatcher.

Call sites to migrate:
1. `field-update-context.tsx:42` — `invoke("update_entity_field", ...)` → dispatch with cmd `entity.update_field`
2. `board-view.tsx:361` — `invoke("add_task", ...)` → dispatch with cmd `task.add`
3. `board-view.tsx:377` — `invoke("move_task", ...)` → dispatch with cmd `task.move`
4. `board-view.tsx:282` — `invoke("reorder_columns", ...)` → dispatch with cmd `column.reorder`
5. `App.tsx:104` — `invoke("untag_task", ...)` → dispatch with cmd `task.untag`
6. `tag-pill.tsx:44` — `invoke("show_tag_context_menu", ...)` → remove entirely (handled by context menu system)

Note: delete commands (delete_task, delete_tag, etc.) and undo/redo are registered in Rust but not yet called from frontend. They'll be wired when context menus and undo are connected.

- [ ] Migrate field-update-context.tsx
- [ ] Migrate board-view.tsx add_task
- [ ] Migrate board-view.tsx move_task
- [ ] Migrate board-view.tsx reorder_columns
- [ ] Migrate App.tsx untag_task
- [ ] Remove show_tag_context_menu invoke from tag-pill.tsx
- [ ] Run tests
Frontend: Migrate mutation invoke() calls to execute_command

+Replace all direct `invoke()` calls for mutations with calls through the command dispatcher.

Call sites to migrate:
1. `field-update-context.tsx:42` — `invoke("update_entity_field", ...)` → `invoke("execute_command", { cmd: "entity.update_field", args })`
2. `board-view.tsx:361` — `invoke("add_task", ...)` → `invoke("execute_command", { cmd: "task.add", args })`
3. `board-view.tsx:377` — `invoke("move_task", ...)` → `invoke("execute_command", { cmd: "task.move", args })`
4. `board-view.tsx:282` — `invoke("reorder_columns", ...)` → `invoke("execute_command", { cmd: "column.reorder", args })`
5. `App.tsx:104` — `invoke("untag_task", ...)` → `invoke("execute_command", { cmd: "task.untag", args })`
6. `tag-pill.tsx:44` — `invoke("show_tag_context_menu", ...)` → remove entirely (handled by context menu system)

Note: delete commands and undo/redo are registered in Rust but not yet called from frontend. They'll be wired when context menus and undo are connected.

- [ ] Migrate field-update-context.tsx
- [ ] Migrate board-view.tsx add_task
- [ ] Migrate board-view.tsx move_task
- [ ] Migrate board-view.tsx reorder_columns
- [ ] Migrate App.tsx untag_task
- [ ] Remove show_tag_context_menu invoke from tag-pill.tsx

Tests (field-update-context.test.tsx — new or extend existing):
- [ ] `updateField calls execute_command with entity.update_field` — mock invoke, verify { cmd: "entity.update_field", args: { entity_type, id, field_name, value } }
- [ ] `updateField calls onRefresh after success` — verify refresh still fires
- [ ] `updateField propagates errors` — invoke rejects, error surfaces

Tests (board-view.test.tsx — new or extend existing):
- [ ] `handleAddTask calls execute_command with task.add` — mock invoke, verify args { title, column }
- [ ] `persistMove calls execute_command with task.move` — mock invoke, verify args { id, column, ordinal, swimlane }
- [ ] `handleDragEnd reorder calls execute_command with column.reorder` — mock invoke, verify columns array

Tests (App.test.tsx — extend existing):
- [ ] `tag_delete action calls execute_command with task.untag` — mock invoke, simulate tag-context-menu event, verify args
\ No newline at end of file
